title: WOS Assertion Gate Library
description: A WOS Assertion Gate Library sidecar document. Provides a reusable collection of assertion gate definitions for WOS data validation pipelines. Pipelines reference assertions by identifier, enabling shared definitions across multiple pipelines and governance documents.

^x-.$comment: Vendor extensions per Kernel spec §10.6 (extensions escape hatch)

$wosAssertionLibrary.description: WOS Assertion Gate Library specification version. MUST be '1.0'.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for WOS Assertion Gate Library sidecar

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI for editor validation.

url.description: Canonical URI identifier for this library.

title.description: Human-readable name for this assertion library.

description.description: Human-readable description of this library's purpose.

assertions.description: Reusable assertion definitions. Referenced by pipeline stages via id.

examples.description: Extracted income values must appear in source pay stub
Total income must equal sum of components

x-lm.intent: The collection of named, reusable assertion gates

extensions.description: Extension data. All keys MUST be prefixed with 'x-'.

id.description: Unique assertion identifier. Referenced by pipeline stages.

x-lm.intent: Determines the verification method for this assertion

expression.description: FEL expression defining the assertion constraint.

referenceStage.description: Reference to a pipeline stage for consistency checking.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this assertion checks.
examples: Extracted income values must appear in the source pay stub document

rejectionPolicy.description: Default rejection policy when this assertion fails.
